name: Suspicious Domain Investigation
description: Investigates suspicious domains by enriching with VirusTotal and WHOIS data, then applying nested decision logic. Newly registered domains with suspicious TLDs undergo deep AI-powered investigation of registration patterns, hosting infrastructure, and connections to known threat infrastructure. Confirmed threat domains are blocked on DNS/proxy, added to the blocked domains EDL, and the threat intel team is notified. Established or unconnected domains are annotated and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Enrich suspicious domains with reputation data, detection ratios, and WHOIS registration details

config.description: Triggers when a suspicious domain alert is ingested from DNS monitoring, threat feeds, or user reports
Enriches the suspicious domain with VirusTotal reputation data and WHOIS registration details including domain age, registrar, and registrant info

data.label: Domain Age < 30 Days AND Suspicious TLD?

config.description: Checks if the domain was registered within the last 30 days and uses a TLD commonly associated with malicious activity

config.additional_instructions: Investigate domain registration patterns, hosting infrastructure, and any connections to known threat infrastructure. Check for domain generation algorithm patterns, fast-flux behavior, and similarities to known malicious domains.
config.description: AI-powered deep investigation of the suspicious domain analyzing registration patterns, hosting infrastructure, and connections to known threat infrastructure
Routes based on whether the AI investigation found connections to known threat infrastructure, C2 servers, or malicious campaigns
Blocks the malicious domain on DNS and web proxy to prevent any internal systems from resolving or connecting to it

parameters.notes: Auto-blocked: new domain linked to threat infrastructure

config.description: Adds the blocked domain to the External Dynamic List for propagation to all perimeter security controls

data.label: Notify Threat Intel Team on Slack

config.description: Sends a notification to the threat intel Slack channel with domain details, investigation findings, and actions taken

data.label: Note: New Domain, No Threat Connection

parameters.note:
Domain {{trigger_1.alert.domain}} is newly registered ({{analyze_1.outputs.enrichments[0].results.domain_age_days}} days) with suspicious TLD, but AI investigation found no confirmed connection to threat infrastructure.

Recommendation: Continue monitoring.

Riggs AI Summary:
{{analyze_2.summary}}

config.description: Adds a note documenting that the domain is new but has no confirmed threat connection, recommending continued monitoring

parameters.note:
Domain {{trigger_1.alert.domain}} is an established domain (age > 30 days) or uses a standard TLD. Assessed as low risk.

Domain Age: {{analyze_1.outputs.enrichments[0].results.domain_age_days}} days
VirusTotal Verdict: {{analyze_1.outputs.aggregated_verdict}}

No further action required.

config.description: Adds a note documenting that the domain is established with a standard TLD and assessed as low risk
